resultList.dtldesc: Experience the charm of modern living with this elite 2 BHK residential house for sale in Chekhla, Ahmedabad. Perfectly situated near essential amenities, this home offers a harmonious blend of comfort and convenience in one of the citys most sought-after locations.Property SpecificationsSpanning an impressive 1200 sq ft with a carpet area of 646 sq ft, this semi-furnished residence unfolds over a stylish ground-plus-one layout. The home features sleek vitrified flooring throughout, radiating a polished, contemporary charm. With its Vaastu compliance and north-facing orientation, positive energy flows freely, creating an uplifting environment.On the ground floor, the expansive living room beckons you to unwind, providing an inviting space for both tranquil evenings and lively gatherings with friends and family. This area seamlessly flows into a modern kitchen, complete with an attached utility space that transforms every cooking session into a delightful experience. Two cozy bedrooms promise restful nights, while two well-appointed bathrooms enhance daily comfort. Additionally, a dedicated puja room and a storeroom add to the practicality and convenience of this thoughtfully designed floor.As you ascend the stairs to the first floor, youll discover another serene puja room, perfect for moments of reflection and tranquility. Step out onto the terrace, where delightful views and a breath of fresh air await, offering an ideal spot to relax or entertain. This residence is not just a home its a sanctuary designed for modern livingFacilitiesThe property benefits from one open and one covered parking space, a 24-hour water supply, and a 100 power backup facility, ensuring uninterrupted living. Added security includes a dedicated guard and CCTV surveillance, ensuring a safe and comfortable environment for you and your family.LocalityConveniently located in a vibrant neighborhood, this property offers easy access to a wealth of amenities. Schools, hospitals, and malls are located within 4 to 5 km, ensuring quick access to essentials. Banks and ATMs are conveniently located nearby, simplifying financial transactions. Public transport, including buses and autos, is readily available, making commuting a breeze. The railway station and metro station are also within 4 to 5 km, providing excellent connectivity to other parts of the region.Dont miss your chance to call this beautiful space your new homewhere comfort meets style and convenience is at your doorstep
